journeyStages.label: Captured
journeyStages.summary: Patient or lead intake exists and awaits triage.

journeyStages.label: Triaged
journeyStages.summary: Ops qualified the case and it is ready to schedule or close.

journeyStages.label: Scheduled
journeyStages.summary: Appointment exists and is pending consultation.

journeyStages.label: In Consult
journeyStages.summary: Patient has arrived and is actively in the consult flow.

journeyStages.label: Closed
journeyStages.summary: Journey ended without further transitions in this slice.
